youtube.description:
Funny Minecraft videos!

I upload every week or every other week! There's no limits to the LARP

banner made by @larpingsheep

if you are interested in becoming an actor for my videos, hanging out or chatting with other fans of my content and sharing fanart which may appear at the end of my videos check out our official ExlarpingTNT Discord server! There may also be sneak peaks at future videos 👀

otherwise if you are interested in acting for Mess Hall Productions (owned by original ExplodingTNT actors) join the official ExplodingTNT Discord!

latestvideo.title: Who even is that blue guy? 😭
